faqs.q: Which visa route applies to me?
faqs.a: We auto-detect it from each pilgrim’s passport: EU/EEA passports use the Saudi e-Visa; Pakistani and other passports route through a MoRA-licensed agent channel. Mixed groups are supported — each pilgrim sees their own route.

faqs.q: What currency am I charged in?
faqs.a: Always EUR. We also show an indicative PKR figure at today’s rate (1 € = ₨310.8) for reference, but the charged amount is never silently converted.

faqs.q: Can I book for a group?
faqs.a: Yes — up to 49 pilgrims in one booking, with per-pilgrim documents and visa routing. Travel agents have a dedicated portal with wallet, credit and markups.

faqs.q: How do I track my booking?
faqs.a: Every booking gets a BRN with a live status timeline (booked → documents → visa → travel → return) and a QR digital pass.

testimonialQuotes: The visa route was clear from the first screen — no surprises. Everything in one cart.
Paid in EUR, saw the PKR figure for my family back home. Beautifully simple.
Live BRN and visa tracking gave my parents real peace of mind.
